title: Fast Fiction Factory Routing Policy Regression Hardening

review_memory_checked.prior_signal_summary: No user review was requested or recorded for this routing-resolution slice; the prior quality audit classified the rows but did not accept routing policy.
review_memory_checked.what_changed: Resolved routing policy is now rechecked against the resolution artifact, source-span pack, and current adapter outputs.
review_memory_checked.what_this_review_decides: No user review is needed; this readback decides whether route policy drift is visible before future adapter changes proceed.
not_asking: canon decisions for Toma fate, brass moth truth, or Council motive
review_memory_checked.next_nonredundant_axis: one missing fixture class if regression hardening later exposes drift

review_memory_checked.detail: manifest and resolution both expose review memory for ambiguous routing

visual_direct_claim_guard.detail: visual rows must not target Claim directly in resolution, pack, or adapter outputs

human_review_hold_guard.detail: unresolved/human-owned decision rows must stay held with human review routing

claim_secondary_evidence_rule.detail: Claim routes in resolved rows must remain secondary evidence and held

timeline_secondary_evidence_rule.detail: Timeline routes in resolved rows must remain secondary evidence and held

source_reference_preservation.detail: source_reference rows must remain source references, not claims

unsafe_unclear_hold_rule.detail: unsafe or unclear routing must stay held and must not suggest adopt

adapter_drift_readback.detail: resolved rows must be visible in source pack and adapter outputs

human_owned_object_profile_primary_hold.detail: human-owned object rows must route first to Profile/Ghost and remain held

no_model_api_behavior_added.detail: model/API boundary remains preserved by structured no-call evidence

route_policy.visual_evidence: visual_asset rows must not create direct Claim targets
route_policy.human_review_hold: unresolved and human-owned decision rows must remain hold with Human Review routing
route_policy.claim_secondary_evidence: Claim routing in resolved rows is secondary evidence unless a later safe policy explicitly changes it
route_policy.timeline_secondary_evidence: Timeline routing in resolved rows is secondary evidence unless a later safe policy explicitly changes it
route_policy.source_reference_preservation: source_reference rows remain source references and never become claims
route_policy.unsafe_unclear_hold: unsafe or unclear routing remains held, not adopted
route_policy.adapter_drift_readback: resolution, source pack, and adapter output ids must agree so drift is visible
